data.body: #685 PS4 + #686 PS2: LLM-Review now +1 (security fix passed review!). But Verified-1 on both = MODULE-SIZE GATE: src/rebar/llm/plan_review/attest.py 913 LOC > pinned ceiling 880 (the security fix's compute_validity helpers grew it). Real gate. Must shrink under 880 via call-graph-seam extraction (no <100 LOC file, no raising ratchet), tests green. Dispatching shrink -> #685 PS5 -> rebase #686.
